untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires detection of 8 sequential new price lines (highs/lows) with daily separation and nested pattern exclusion logic. This cannot be expressed using single-candle technical indicators. The pattern is a multi-bar structural pattern requiring custom candlestick sequence detection beyond the scope of allowed indicators (which are point-in-time or simple moving averages). A custom pattern detector function is required.
translation_notes: Signal describes a complex candlestick pattern (8 New Price Lines) that requires: (1) tracking 8 consecutive new highs or lows, (2) ensuring 1-day separation between each, (3) detecting nested pattern exclusion rules, and (4) identifying directional breakouts. These requirements exceed what can be expressed through the allowed indicator set. The entry/exit conditions provided are placeholder approximations only and do NOT capture the actual pattern logic. Author provided minimal parameter details (marked AUTHOR_SILENT), further limiting translation accuracy.
